---
title: "Stat331 Assignment 1"
author: "Milagro Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

## Setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("analysis.R")
```

## Load data

```{r}
# Update the file path to your assignment dataset
df <- load_assignment_data("data/raw/students.csv")
head(df)
```

## Transform data

```{r}
df <- add_exam_average(df, "exam1", "exam2")
summary(df$average)
```

## Visualization

```{r}
hist(df$average, main = "Average Score Distribution", xlab = "Average")
```

## Conclusions

Write your interpretation here.
